reasoning: Koren, we need to focus on your lactate clearance and aerobic base as highlighted by the drop in power from 5-min to 20-min efforts. Your last ride was a bit low on intensity, so this session is crucial. Improving these areas will enhance your performance on the Alpine Loop, especially during the challenging main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 x 8-minute intervals: first 4 minutes at 245W, then 4 minutes at 210W. 2-minute easy spin between efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to flush out lactate

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
